chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. A. No.S-172 of 2024. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For orders on MA No.2431 of 2024. E/A. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on MA No.2432 of 2024. S/A 12.02.2025. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------ Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Asif Ali Abdul Razak Soomro, Advocate for the Applicant, under instructions does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which is dismissed as not pressed along-with listed applications. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
